issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing API keys or rate limiting.
The skill includes verbose guidelines that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: Structured person extraction with guaranteed schema
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relies on prompt-based JSON or the older json_object response_format, missing schema enforcement, while treatment uses response_format type json_schema with required fields and gpt-4o as documented.

scenarios.name: Stream chat response to Next.js frontend
scenarios.rationale: Baseline shows generic stream=true SSE plumbing but skips the Vercel AI SDK helpers, while treatment uses the documented OpenAIStream/StreamingTextResponse pattern plus the delta loop.
